name: 后室重生Backrooms Rebirth
short_description: 这是一款以后室题材的游戏，主要是一些恐怖元素和解谜内容组合起来的元素，这是我们的第一款游戏也是开始
detailed_description:
This game is a horror puzzle type game based on the theme of the Backrooms, find an exit in each level to escape from here, before you have to keep avoiding the pursuit of unknown monsters, and then open the door through various methods to find props to clear the game, cheer the wanderer. If there are any bugs, we will fix them as soon as possible.,If you can't fix it today, we won't live up to everyone's expectations tomorrow.,And because this is our first game.,There are also bad reviews.,But I really hope you can experience it for yourself.,We hope that every bad review or good review can help me for the first time.。
We've also collaborated on a new game


Here is the steam store link
You can support it
Our QQ group number: 529507253
